Title: Create a new user
Preconditions: None
Test Data:
- Valid user details (name, cognome, email, photo, neiborhood, chat)
- Invalid user details (missing required fields)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user creation page.
2. Enter valid user details and submit.
3. Enter invalid user details and submit.
Expected Result:
- A new user is successfully created with valid details.
- An error message is displayed for invalid user details.

Title: Authenticate a user
Preconditions: User account exists
Test Data:
- Valid user credentials (email, password)
- Invalid user credentials (wrong email, wrong password)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter valid user credentials and submit.
3. Enter invalid user credentials and submit.
Expected Result:
- User is authenticated and redirected to the home page.
- An error message is displayed for invalid credentials.

Title: Navigate through home components
Preconditions: User account exists and is authenticated
Test Data: - Valid interaction with components (profile, notificationSection, mapFullScreenAPI, chatSection, generalDashboard)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page.
2. Interact with the profile component.
3. Interact with the notification section.
4. Interact with the map full screen API.
5. Interact with the chat section.
6. Interact with the general dashboard.
Expected Result: - Components are navigated and interacted with successfully.

Title: View full screen post
Preconditions: User account exists and is authenticated, post exists
Test Data: - Valid post details (section, fullScreenPost, leaveComment, attendi salvataggio)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the general dashboard.
2. Click on a highlighted section.
3. Click on a specific post.
4. Wait for related comments to load.
5. Add a comment.
Expected Result:
- Full screen post is viewed successfully.
- Comments are loaded and a new comment can be added.
